title: School careers event
explanation:
School careers event

Listen to an announcement at a school careers event.

Transcript

Speaker: Welcome to our annual careers afternoon. Today you can attend talks on engineering, nursing, journalism and software development. Please check the timetable on the noticeboard. The first sessions start at 1:30 in rooms 12, 14, 18 and 20. If you would like one-to-one advice, career advisers will be available in the library after 3 p.m.

questions.text: The event offers talks on [*four|two|six] career areas.
questions.feedback: Engineering, nursing, journalism and software development.

questions.text: One-to-one advice will be in the [*library|hall|canteen].
The event happens in a [*school|hospital|company office].

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: Students should check the ____ on the noticeboard. | *timetable | budget | recipe
questions.feedback: Timetable tells them where and when.

questions.text: Career advisers will be available after ____ p.m. | *3 | 2 | 4
One of the sessions is about ____ development. | *software | budget | social
The event is held every year, so it is ____. | *annual | casual | private
The purpose of the message is to [*give practical event information|advertise a film|discuss exam results].
questions.feedback: It gives time and location details.

questions.text: The speaker expects students to [*move between sessions|stay in one room all day|go home early].
questions.feedback: They can attend talks in different rooms.

questions.text: Students who want personal advice should wait until [*after three|half past one|lunchtime].
